content:
REMOTE_BURNIN_AGGREGATE
PARENT: [DAS-98](mention://issue/1be2d0ce-2921-473e-b543-1ecced3155ac) / 1be2d0ce-2921-473e-b543-1ecced3155ac
WINDOW: 2026-05-01T03:25Z-03:27Z

SCOREBOARD:
- [DAS-99](mention://issue/391ce387-61df-4a56-81aa-a00cb437bb54) NYC Codex Builder: FLAG. Remote Codex execution, issue read/comment, pressure checks all worked; repo checkout still resolves to stale laptop-local file:// metadata and fails before GitHub-backed checkout.
- [DAS-100](mention://issue/f03da797-c2f8-4342-a7c2-16b3f81a153c) NYC VM Runner: FLAG. Dry-lease probe completed safely; runtime pressure OK and Python exists, but Docker/browser binaries are absent and the issue did not declare full VM lease fields for an actual VM smoke.
- [DAS-101](mention://issue/25217770-9d18-44c8-a1a9-ef799cf699d0) NYC Ops Mechanic: PASS. Daemon/runtimes visible, disk 60% used with ~31G available, memory ~1.7Gi available, no obvious pressure. tmux still has sessions, including one attached Hermes-named session, so cleanup ownership was not claimed.
- [DAS-102](mention://issue/6763b50a-0113-490f-95f7-624b629e27ff) NYC Hermes Researcher: PASS. Scoped issue/comment synthesis and runtime checks worked; Hermes update lag did not appear relevant to this burn-in.

REMOTE_PRESSURE:
- All four remote agents returned to idle after completing runs.
- No token/OAuth/API key/cookie/raw env material was requested or printed in reports.
- No repo edits, daemon mutation, destructive commands, container starts, browser launches, or VM sessions were performed.

ACTIONS_TAKEN:
- Keeping [DAS-99](mention://issue/391ce387-61df-4a56-81aa-a00cb437bb54) and [DAS-100](mention://issue/f03da797-c2f8-4342-a7c2-16b3f81a153c) in_review as bounded FLAG follow-ups.
- Closing [DAS-101](mention://issue/25217770-9d18-44c8-a1a9-ef799cf699d0) and [DAS-102](mention://issue/6763b50a-0113-490f-95f7-624b629e27ff) to done.

NEXT_ACTION:
- Fix/reconcile the remote repo anchor before heavy NYC Codex repo-backed work.
- Add explicit VM lease fields and install/verify Docker/browser tooling before an actual NYC VM/browser smoke.

OVERALL_VERDICT: FLAG
